title: Attatag Gosem
content:
{{Top|fca|leg}} {{Character |type=Corporate |image=[[File:AttatagGosem.jpg]] |name=Attatag Gosem |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]][[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[One Sith]] (rumored) *[[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]][[Legacy — War 3|''Legacy — War'' 3]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Wow. Place has taken a beating since we were here last.''"
"''Pol Temm tried enforcing his ''"no weapons"'' rule with a Sith Destroyer—ain't been seen since. The new admin, Attatag Gosem, don't much care about rules.|[[Cade Skywalker]] and [[Jariah Syn]]|}} '''Attatag Gosem''' was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] who won [[the Big Game]], a [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiatorial]] event on [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]], for three consecutive [[Standard year/Legends|years]] around [[130 ABY]]. The competition was abolished when The Wheel changed ownership, and he turned to a life of crime, working as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] and [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]]. Rumors stated that he worked with the [[One Sith]]. Gosem became the newest [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] of The Wheel around [[138 ABY]] after the disappearance of the previous one, [[Pol Temm]], and re-instituted the Big Game. Rules were rarely enforced under his leadership, and the station fell into a squalid and rusty state. ==Biography== Attatag Gosem was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] who lived around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[130 ABY]].{{SW|url=news/viva-space-vegas-the-history-of-the-marvelous-wheel-part-2|series=Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} states that Gosem was competing in [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel's]] [[The Big Game|Big Game]] competition around the time of the rise of [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]], which is dated to [[130 ABY]] by [[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]]. He competed in and won [[the Big Game]]—a brutal [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiatorial]] event that took place on [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]], a popular [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Besh Gorgon system/Legends|Besh Gorgon system]]—for three consecutive years. However, the station passed into the hands of a new [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]], [[Pol Temm]], around 130 ABY, and the Big Game was abolished. Gosem turned to a life of crime{{SW|url=news/viva-space-vegas-the-history-of-the-marvelous-wheel-part-2|series=Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} and became a known [[Spy/Legends|spy]] and [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]]. He was rumored to work with the [[One Sith]]. Around [[138 ABY]], Temm disappeared after trying to enforce his "no weapons" policy with a [[Nebula-class Star Destroyer|''Defender''-class Star Destroyer]] against a group of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] Supremacists, and Gosem took his place, becoming The Wheel's twelfth administrator. His suspected [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] affiliations caused some to be suspicious of his return, but when he revoked the ban on the Big Game, many were pleased. Gosem largely did away with imposing rules aboard The Wheel, and the station accordingly fell into a decrepit state of squalor and rust. ==Personality and traits== Attatag Gosem was a beefy individual who won the Big Game three years running. His return to The Wheel led to both suspicion and praise, respectively due to his rumored allegiance to the Sith and his re-institution of the the Big Game. Gosem carried a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], wore dark [[Armor/Legends|armor]], and sported a [[Microphone/Legends|microphone]] headset. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|With Gosem, the character had potential storylines that would have played out but there just wasn't room to get them in. Every good character should be capable of developing storylines, I think.|John Ostrander|{{JCFCite|url=posts/31807162|board=Literature|thread=LEGACY: WAR Q&A WITH JOHN OSTRANDER AND JAN DUURSEMA (HIGHLIGHTED SPOILERS ALLOWED)|user=jfostrander01|date=2011-07-12|time=6:41 PM|archiveurl=https://archive.is/fkeRa}}. Retrieved on [[August 6]], [[2011]].}} Attatag Gosem was created by [[John Ostrander]] and [[Jan Duursema]] for the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]''. A picture drawn by [[Dan Parsons]], and a short informative blurb about him appeared in the [[June]] [[2006]] reference book [[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]], which introduced many of the series' primary characters and other elements. Everything that was showcased in ''Legacy 0'' went on to play a role in the series, save for Gosem, who failed to appear in a single issue of ''Legacy'' during its fifty-issue run. Ostrander later stated that he and Duursema had had storylines in mind for the character, but that there had ultimately been no room to fit them in to existing stories which already featured ''Legacy''{{'s}} large ensemble cast.{{JCFCite|url=posts/31804470|board=Literature|thread=LEGACY: WAR Q&A WITH JOHN OSTRANDER AND JAN DUURSEMA (HIGHLIGHTED SPOILERS ALLOWED)|user=jfostrander01|date=2011-07-10|time=7:16 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200802125313/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/legacy-war-q-a-with-john-ostrander-and-jan-duursema-highlighted-spoilers-allowed.31721071/page-5}}. Retrieved on [[August 6]], [[2011]]. Gosem was finally referenced in the [[Legacy — War 3|third issue]] of ''Legacy''{{'s}} followup miniseries, [[Star Wars: Legacy — War|''Star Wars: Legacy—War'']], and was profiled in the [[2013]] [[StarWars.com]] blog article "[[Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel]], Part 2," written by [[Abel G. Peña]] and [[Rich Handley]]. ==Appearances== *[[Legacy — War 3|''Legacy — War'' 3]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]] {{1stm}} *{{SW|url=news/viva-space-vegas-the-history-of-the-marvelous-wheel-part-2|series=Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Administrator/Legends|Administrator]] of [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] |years=c. [[138 ABY]]– |before=[[Pol Temm]] |before-years=c. [[130 ABY]]–c. [[138 ABY]] |after= |afteryears= }} {{EndBox}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Attatag Gosem |es=Attatag Gosem }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Gosem, Attatag}} [[Category:Business owners and executives]] [[Category:Gotals]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Information brokers]] [[Category:Personnel of Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Spies]] [[Category:The Wheel residents]]
